name: Find and fix an off-by-one bug
prompt: The function `paginate` in src/paginate.ts has a bug. Pages are zero-indexed (page 0 is the first page). When called with `paginate([1,2,3,4,5], 2, 2)` it should return `[5]` — pages are `[1,2]`, `[3,4]`, `[5]`. Currently it returns wrong results. Find and fix the bug.
